description: Records all incoming deliveries from vendors. Created by receiving workflow 05. Used in three-way matching against POs and invoices (Blueprint 5D, 5E).

fields.name: Delivery ID
fields.description: Unique delivery identifier. Generated by workflow 05 in format DEL-{timestamp}-{random}.

fields.name: PO Number
fields.description: Purchase order this delivery is fulfilling.

fields.name: Purchase Order
fields.description: Link to the PO record.

fields.name: Vendor
fields.description: Link to vendor master.

fields.name: Vendor Name
fields.description: Vendor name (denormalized for quick reference).

fields.name: Delivery Date
fields.description: Date of delivery. Defaults to today.

fields.name: Delivery Time
fields.description: Time of delivery.

fields.name: Received By
fields.description: Name of employee who received the delivery.

fields.name: Items
fields.description: JSON array of delivered items. Format from workflow 05: [{"itemName", "sku", "quantityOrdered", "quantityReceived", "unitPrice", "notes", "hasDiscrepancy"}]

fields.name: Line Item Count
fields.description: Number of different items on this delivery.

fields.name: Total Items Received
fields.description: Sum of all quantities received.

fields.name: Has Discrepancy
fields.description: True if any item has quantityOrdered != quantityReceived.

fields.name: Discrepancy Details
fields.description: List of items with shortages or overages.

fields.name: Temperature
fields.description: Recorded temperature for cold items (optional, from Bluetooth probe).

fields.name: Quality Issues
fields.description: Whether any quality problems were noted.

fields.name: Quality Notes
fields.description: Details of quality issues if any.

fields.name: Photos
fields.description: Photos of delivery, damages, or quality issues.

fields.name: Invoice
fields.description: Link to matched invoice for three-way match.

fields.name: Status
fields.description: Current state of delivery processing.

fields.name: Signed By
fields.description: Digital signature of receiver.

fields.name: Carrier
fields.description: Delivery carrier/trucking company.

fields.name: Tracking Number
fields.description: Carrier tracking number if applicable.

fields.name: BOL Number
fields.description: Bill of Lading number.

fields.name: Created At
fields.description: Record creation timestamp.

views.name: Pending Check-In
views.description: Deliveries received but not yet fully processed.

views.name: With Discrepancies
views.description: Deliveries with quantity or quality issues.
